common.pom: High engagement across social platforms with meme creation, coordinated hype cycles, and rapid spread of content driving community cohesion.
common.vision: Unite participants around shared internet meme identity and humor.

comud.pom: Strong social energy and participation but limited structural depth; activity fluctuates with market sentiment and meme relevance.
comud.vision: Maintain an active, engaged, and self-reinforcing meme-driven community.

equilibrium.pom: Liquidity pools and exchange listings enable continuous trading; demand driven by attention cycles rather than functional necessity or sustained utility.
equilibrium.vision: Capture speculative demand for meme assets in crypto markets.

guide.pom: No formal roadmap or governance; direction emerges from social media trends, influencer attention, and trading activity on decentralized and centralized exchanges.
guide.vision: Sustain relevance through viral cycles and community-led narrative momentum.

success.pom: Measured by market cap spikes, trading volume, and exchange listings rather than product adoption or technological milestones.
success.vision: Achieve widespread recognition and sustained trading volume in crypto markets.

vow.pom: Primarily traded as an ERC-20 token with no intrinsic utility, value driven by meme virality and speculative demand rather than verifiable onchain utility beyond transfers and liquidity.
vow.vision: Amplify meme culture through a decentralized, community-driven token.
